    Index

    A B C D E F G H I L M N P R S T U W 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    S

    secondary - Variable in class utils.themes.Theme
    Secondary accent color.
    SECONDARY - Static variable in class canvas.CanvasData
    Secondary accent color.
    set(int, int, int, byte) - Method in class canvas.CanvasData
    Writes a pixel value into one of the canvas layers.
    setOnThemeRefreshed(Runnable) - Method in class gui.BrushPane
    Sets a callback invoked whenever icons are rebuilt due to theme changes.
    setTheme(String) - Static method in class utils.themes.ThemeManager
    Changes the active theme by name.
    shape(int, int, int) - Method in class brush.AbstractBrush
    Randomly selects one of several shape modes: Perfect circle Wobbly jittered circle Half-tone circle (checker pattern) Ellipse (calligraphy effect) This gives brushes a natural, varied texture.
    speedScale - Variable in class brush.AbstractBrush
    Strength of size reduction as speed increases.
    SprayBrush - Class in brush
    A simple spray-paint style brush.
    SprayBrush(int, double) - Constructor for class brush.SprayBrush
    Creates a spray brush with a given base size and speed scaling.
    sprayCircle(CanvasData, double, double, int, int, int, int) - Method in class brush.AbstractSpray
    Sprays a number of random particles inside a circle with radius radius.
    sprayIcon - Variable in class gui.BrushPane
     
    stamp(CanvasData, double, double, int, int, int) - Method in class brush.AbstractBrush
    Places a single “dab” of the brush shape onto the canvas.
    stamp(CanvasData, double, double, int, int, int) - Method in class brush.EraserBrush
    Erases pixels inside a filled circle centered at (x, y).
    stamp(CanvasData, double, double, int, int, int) - Method in class brush.FountainBrush
    Places a jittered circular dab on the canvas.
    stamp(CanvasData, double, double, int, int, int) - Method in class brush.HighlightBrush
    Paints a jittered highlight dab at position (x, y).
    stamp(CanvasData, double, double, int, int, int) - Method in class brush.PencilBrush
    Draws a jittered pencil dab at the given position.
    stamp(CanvasData, double, double, int, int, int) - Method in class brush.SprayBrush
    Applies a spray dab at the given (x, y) position by scattering random particles inside a circle.
    stampLine(CanvasData, double, double, double, double, int, int, int) - Method in class brush.AbstractBrush
    Draws a smooth line between the previous point (x0, y0) and the new point (x1, y1) by placing interpolated dabs.
    start(Stage) - Method in class application.Main
    Initializes and displays the main JavaFX stage.
    startWiggleLoop() - Method in class controller.CanvasController
    Starts the wiggle animation loop.
